page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance powered by the Intel Xeon 8369B processor. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, this instance features 64 dedicated physical cores and 64 vCPUs running at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. It is equipped with 256.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage and KVM virtualization. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 32 Gbps.

Benchmark results indicate strong multi-core processing capabilities, with stress-ng multi-core CPU performance and Geekbench multi-core scores placing in the top 25% tier. The processor's support for AVX-512 and cryptography extensions contributes to strong performance in encryption tasks and database operations. Single-core performance, including stress-ng single-core and Geekbench single-core metrics, falls within the average range. Memory bandwidth tests show moderate throughput, with read-only large block transfers reaching 169.75 GB/sec and write operations at 71.23 GB/sec.

Given its balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and high core count, the ecs.g7.16xlarge is highly efficient for multi-threaded workloads that scale across many cores. It demonstrates strong performance in software compilation, ray tracing, and static web serving. The instance is also well-suited for database operations and small-scale language model inference, though it lacks the local storage or GPU acceleration required for massive database indexing or large-scale deep learning. From a resource density perspective, it offers a cost-effective platform for enterprise applications requiring high parallel processing capacity without the premium cost of memory-optimized or GPU-accelerated hardware.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs and 64 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. It is configured with 256.0 GB of RAM, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB per core ratio, and features a 32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators. Benchmark data highlights strong multi-core CPU performance, software compilation speeds, and database operations, placing it in the top 25% tier for parallel processing. Conversely, single-core performance and memory bandwidth remain in the average range. This hardware profile makes the ecs.g7.16xlarge highly suitable for multi-threaded enterprise workloads, static web serving, software development pipelines, and medium-scale database deployments that benefit from high core counts without requiring specialized storage or GPU hardware.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 32 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering strong multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.16xlarge features 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 256 GB RAM, offering strong multi-core performance for enterprise workloads.
tagline: A high-core general-purpose instance offering balanced memory and dedicated compute power for demanding multi-threaded enterprise applications.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 256 GB of system memory
32 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for reliable connectivity
Strong multi-core performance, ideal for parallel processing tasks
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Optimized for software compilation, database operations, and web serving
